suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.

import { motion } from "framer-motion"; import { Target, Users, ShieldCheck, HeartPulse, MapPin, CheckCircle2, Star, TrendingUp, Info } from "lucide-react"; import Navbar from "@/components/layout/Navbar"; import Footer from "@/components/layout/Footer"; export default function About() { return (

About Salem Directory

India's #1 Local Business Network for Salem District, Tamil Nadu

Our Mission

Salem Directory is a comprehensive local business listing platform dedicated to connecting businesses with customers in Salem District, Tamil Nadu. We believe every local business deserves online visibility, and we make it affordable and accessible for all.

With over 5,000 verified businesses across 300+ categories, we are the most trusted and complete business directory serving Salem and surrounding areas.

return (

Connecting Salem Since 2024 Salem's Most Trusted
Business Directory We are building India's #1 local business network, starting right here in Salem District. Connecting thousands of business owners with loyal local customers.

{/* Narrative Section */}

"Our mission is simple: To provide every small business in Salem a digital home where they can be found by everyone."

Our Vision

Salem Directory was founded with the aim of digitizing the local economy of Salem District. We believe that whether it's a small local silk shop in Shevapet or a major hospital, everyone deserves to be found quickly and easily by the community.

Customers call you directly on your phone." }, { title: "Modern Directory", desc: "Clean, fast, and optimized for both search engines and mobile users." } ].map((item, idx) => (

import { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { useParams, Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { MapPin, Phone, Mail, Globe, ShieldCheck, Share2, ArrowLeft, ChevronRight, LayoutGrid, Star, Clock, Heart, Award, CheckCircle2 } from "lucide-react"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import Navbar from "@/components/layout/Navbar"; import Footer from "@/components/layout/Footer"; import axios from "axios"; import { motion } from "framer-motion"; export default function BusinessDetail() { const { slug } = useParams(); const [business, setBusiness] = useState(null); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { const fetchBusiness = async () => { try { const res = await axios.get(`http://localhost/salem-connect/backend/api/v1/businesses.php?slug=${slug}`); if (res.data.success) { setBusiness(res.data.data); } } catch (err) { console.error("Fetch failed"); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; fetchBusiness(); window.scrollTo(0, 0); }, [slug]); if (loading) return
Gathering business details...
; if (!business) return
Business not found.
; return (
Home {business.categoryName} {business.businessName}

{business.businessName}

{business.verified && ( Verified )}
{business.categoryName}
{/* Hero Header Section */}
{/* Logo / Initial Plate */}
{business.logo_url ? : business.business_name[0]}

{business.business_name}

Verified Business

{business.category_name}

{business.area}, Salem
Mon - Sat (9:00 AM - 8:00 PM)
Joined 2024
{/* Action Buttons */}
{/* Detailed Description */}

About Business

{business.description || "The business description is currently being updated. Please check back soon or contact the business directly for more information."}

Business Owner

{business.owner_name || 'Verification Pending'}

Verified ID

#SALEM-{business.id}002

{/* Address Map Section Placeholder */}

{business.business_name}

{business.address}

Interactive Maps Coming Soon

{/* Sidebar: All Contact details */}

Contact Info

Mobile & WhatsApp

{business.mobile}

Business Email

{business.email || 'Contact via Phone'}

Official Website

{business.website ? business.website.replace('https://', '') : 'No Website'}

Business Locality

{business.area}

{business.city}, {business.state} - {business.pincode}

{/* Safety Badge */}

Verified by Directory

Details updated 2024

{/* Related Businesses (Placeholder Section) */}

Related Businesses

View All {business.category_name}
{[1, 2, 3, 4].map((i) => (
))}
); }
